description_long: This object is a modern shotgun with a tactical design, featuring a long, matte black barrel and a robust receiver. The fore-end appears to have a pump-action mechanism, with visible ribbing and a grip-friendly texture. The stock is a pistol grip style, providing ergonomic handling, and the trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized for finger protection. The receiver is adorned with some colored details, possibly indicating controls or decorative elements. The overall build suggests a focus on durability and ease of use in urban environments, with a combination of metal and polymer materials.
description: A tactical, matte black shotgun with a pump-action fore-end, pistol grip stock, and colored receiver details.
description_view_0: The left side of the shotgun is visible, showing the pistol grip, part of the receiver, and the end of the barrel.
description_view_1: The right side reveals the full length of the barrel, the pump-action fore-end, and the colored receiver details.
description_view_2: This view highlights the underside, showing the alignment of the barrel, the pump grip, and the trigger guard.
description_view_3: The top-down perspective emphasizes the length of the barrel and the streamlined design of the stock and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
